core_payload.content:
# Vault Stewardship Swarm

## 1. Role
Vault Stewardship Swarm is the explicit maintenance cluster that studies the vault, plans bounded improvement, and keeps graph quality rising over time. It now routes that work through four bounded sub-hubs so inventory pressure, work planning and review, mutation workers, and runtime modes stay explicit instead of collapsing into one flat registry.

## 2. Routing Surfaces
- `inventory-pressure` owns vault reading, research pressure detection, and gap sensing before any mutation packet is proposed.
- `work-planning-review` owns job generation, critique pressure, evidence trails, and branch or validation handoff.
- `mutation-workers` owns decomposition, markup, graph refactor, and update landing once a packet is ready to act.
- `runtime-modes` owns day and night posture, control surfaces, daemon footing, assignment continuity, and operator-visible stewardship channels.

## 3. Parent Boundary
The parent swarm hub keeps only top-level relationships to Key Agents, Capsule Graph Maintenance, Background Agent Runtime, Personal AI Assistant, To Dig Deep, and the four stewardship sub-hubs. Detailed worker routing now flows through those sub-hubs so Vault Stewardship Swarm remains a coordination map instead of a 24-link directory of mixed runtime, review, and mutation surfaces.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Vault Stewardship Swarm now acts as a bounded routing hub for four explicit stewardship surfaces: inventory pressure, work planning and review, mutation workers, and runtime modes. The parent keeps only top-level relationships to Key Agents, Capsule Graph Maintenance, Background Agent Runtime, Personal AI Assistant, To Dig Deep, and the four sub-hubs. This makes stewardship easier to inspect because vault reading, review discipline, structural mutation, and day or night runtime posture no longer hide inside one overloaded parent capsule.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Refactored Vault Stewardship Swarm into four bounded sub-hubs so inventory sensing, planning and review, mutation workers, and runtime modes no longer collapse into a 24-link parent hub.
